name: Micron Technology
confidenceReason: DISQUALIFIED: Memory semis are hyper-cyclical commodities. The boom/bust cycle destroys long-term CAGR compounding, making it incompatible with a buy-and-hold momentum strategy.
bullCase: The AI bottleneck is shifting to High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM). The physics of HBM require vastly more wafer capacity, leading to a structural supply shortage, skyrocketing unit prices, and massive FCF generation.
bearCase: DISQUALIFIED: Memory semis are hyper-cyclical commodities. The boom/bust cycle destroys long-term CAGR compounding, making it incompatible with a buy-and-hold momentum strategy. Traditional memory is a notoriously cyclical commodity. Requires strict monitoring of global memory supply dynamics to avoid the devastating downside of the hardware cycle.

cagrModel.basis: Cyclical memory; forward PE at cycle peak; exit PE 20 reflects mid-cycle normalized earnings

screener.note: Cheap (0.44) but base return -3% misses the 15% hurdle (CYCLICAL EPS)

description: Micron Technology, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells memory and storage products in the United States, Taiwan, Japan, Mainland China, Hong Kong, Europe, and internationally.
